ddls:
CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was recorded */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was recorded */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was recorded */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour the data was recorded */,
  "minute" INTEGER /* Minute the data was recorded */,
  "tdry" REAL /* Temperature reading in degrees Fahrenheit */,
  "meta" TEXT /* Metadata about the data record (e.g., original temperature reading) */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the weather stations table */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in feet */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the weather station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the weather station */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_data_station_id FOREIGN KEY ("station_id") REFERENCES weather_stations ("station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "organization" TEXT /* Organization responsible for the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_uploader" (
  "upload_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data upload */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who uploaded the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the data was uploaded */,
  "upload_time" TEXT /* Time the data was uploaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("upload_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_formats" (
  "format_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data format */,
  "format_name" TEXT /* Name of the data format */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data format */,
  "file_extension" TEXT /* File extension associated with the data format */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("format_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_set" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data set */,
  "set_name" TEXT /* Name of the data set */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data set */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data set (e.g., temperature, precipitation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_set_details" (
  "set_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data set */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "format_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data format */,
  "set_description" TEXT /* Description of the data set */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the data set */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the data set */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("set_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_set_details_format_id FOREIGN KEY ("format_id") REFERENCES data_formats ("format_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_set_details_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "comment_time" TEXT /* Time when the comment was made */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user assigning the tag */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "tag_date" TEXT /* Date when the tag was assigned */,
  "tag_time" TEXT /* Time when the tag was assigned */,
  "tag_text" TEXT /* Text of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tags_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "discussions" (
  "discussion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each discussion */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user participating in the discussion */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data record */,
  "discussion_date" TEXT /* Date when the discussion took place */,
  "discussion_time" TEXT /* Time when the discussion took place */,
  "discussion_text" TEXT /* Text of the discussion */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("discussion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_discussions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the data was recorded */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the data was recorded */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the data was recorded */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_stations" (
  "station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the weather station */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key referencing the locations table */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the weather station in feet */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("station_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_stations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)
